/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,180p' sympy/core/_print_helpers.py; git log --oneline --decorate -20; git log --all --oneline -- sympy/core/_print_helpers.py sympy/core/basic.py sympy/core/tests/test_basic.py | head -n 100; git blame -L 1,100 sympy/core/_print_helpers.py; git blame -L 25,48 sympy/core/tests/test_basic.py"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import Basic, Symbol
from sympy.core._print_helpers import Printable
from sympy.core.expr import Expr, AtomicExpr
from sympy.core.basic import Atom
from sympy.logic.boolalg import Boolean
for cls in (Printable, Basic, Atom, Expr, AtomicExpr, Boolean, Symbol):
    print(cls.__name__, '__slots__ locally:', cls.__dict__.get('__slots__', '<missing>'), 'dictoffset:', cls.__dictoffset__, 'weakref:', cls.__weakrefoffset__)
for obj in (Basic(), Symbol('s')):
    print(type(obj).__name__, 'dict:', getattr(obj, '__dict__', '<none>'))
PY"

for obj in (Basic(), Symbol('s')):

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python -c \"from sympy import Basic, Symbol; from sympy.core._print_helpers import Printable; print(Basic.__mro__); print(Printable.__dict__.get('__slots__')); print(Basic.__dictoffset__, Symbol.__dictoffset__); print(Basic().__dict__, Symbol('s').__dict__)\""

/bin/zsh -lc "rg -n \"__dict__|__slots__|no.*dict|slots\" sympy/core/tests sympy/*/tests | head -n 200 && ./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import Basic, Symbol
from sympy.core._print_helpers import Printable
for cls in (Printable, Basic, Symbol):
    print(cls.__name__, cls.__mro__)
    print('own slots:', cls.__dict__.get('__slots__'))
    print('dict providers:', [c.__name__ for c in cls.__mro__ if '__dict__' in c.__dict__])
try:
    print(Symbol('s').__dict__)
except AttributeError as exc:
    print(type(exc).__name__, exc)
PY"
